commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: For I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which all your adversaries shall not be able to contradict nor resist. I will give In some parts it is said, that Christ himself will speak by the mouths of his disciples, as in this passage of St. Luke; in other places, as St. Matthew Chap. that the Father will speak; and St. that the Spirit of the Father will speak. In these different texts there is no contradiction, but a most perfect harmony. What one of the divine Persons says, all three say; for the voice of the Trinity is only one.
